title: J.P. Nadda to inaugurate ₹600 crore medical infrastructure in A.P. government hospitals on May 14
description: Health Minister Satyakumar Yadav says Union Minister J.P. Nadda will open 24 critical-care blocks across Andhra Pradesh, with 1,275 additional beds; ₹35 crore action plan prepared for the Government General Hospital, Kakinada; 46 Assistant and Associate Professors appointed in Rangaraya Medical College
